title: Query with set comparation failed: `Unsupported type: Set`
bug_features_seed: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1, t2;
CREATE TABLE t1 (col1 BINARY(4), col2 Int32 DEFAULT 0);
CREATE TABLE t2 (col1 String, col2 String);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE col1 <> (SELECT col1 FROM t2 WHERE col2 = 'Test1');
key_bug_features: Comparing binary column with set type in query
